campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to hear a financial report from the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority covering March 2026 investments, passed a new policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities, and discussed efforts to fill city job openings and improve employee retention.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New policy prohibiting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and employee retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to discuss plans for cleaning up hazardous conditions on properties identified by the County, and residents could object to these cleanup efforts. The council also adopted a new technology policy for the city and approved a process for residents to request accommodations when dealing with city services.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanup plans
New city technology policy adoption
Process for requesting reasonable accommodations from the city

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review March financial reports, and authorize several town projects and agreements. The council approved donations, service contracts, a paving construction project, and grant applications for upcoming fiscal year work.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract
Authorized acceptance of donated Automated External Defibrillator
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment reports
Approved grant applications for statewide projects
Adopted project list for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 13, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a brief meeting to organize their upcoming business, including finalizing the agenda for May 19 and scheduling council members for various city committees and boards. The council also discussed travel requests and approved their meeting schedule for the next fiscal year.
keyTopics: Finalized agenda items and schedule for May 19 council meeting
Council member assignments to city committees, boards, and commissions
Fiscal Year 2026-2027 meeting calendar approved
Travel request approval process

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 19, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council held a special evening session on May 19, 2026, to hear the State of the City Address. The meeting included a legal notice reminding residents they have 90 days to challenge certain city decisions in court.
keyTopics: State of the City Address presentation
90-day deadline for residents to legally challenge city administrative decisions
Superior Court appeal process for city actions

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held their May 19, 2026 meeting, which included a flag salute and recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting covered approval of April meeting minutes and other city business.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Affordable Housing Month observance
April meeting minutes approval

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met on May 19, 2026, to update the city's long-range health and safety planning document that guides development through 2040. The council also recognized the Public Works Department for their work on infrastructure and services, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan (2015-2040)
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions including streets, transportation, and sustainability
Public Works Week recognition (May 17-23, 2026)
Asian American Pacific Islander Month celebration

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 19, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 in a hybrid format, allowing both in-person and remote participation. Councilmember Albert Gonzalez participated remotely under a state law provision that allows council members to attend meetings from home for specific reasons.
keyTopics: Hybrid meeting format available via Zoom and phone for public participation
Councilmember Albert Gonzalez attending remotely under SB 707 'Just Cause' provision
Public comment submission available through eComment system

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 to address several planning and administrative matters. Key decisions included approving changes to a development permit and tentative map, passing new city ordinances, confirming a special assessment, and appointing a new permanent City Manager.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance passed
Site development permit amendment and tentative map approval
Special assessment confirmation and ordering
Appointment of permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to discuss plans for helping residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles to guide these electrification programs and ensure the city complies with air quality regulations from the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification program principles and guidelines
Compliance with Air District regulations
Status update on home electrification efforts
Staff presentation on proposed assistance programs
